animeFinalQuestCodes.title: Anime Final Quest Codes
animeFinalQuestCodes.subtitle: Claim the newest Anime Final Quest codes for Weapon Lucky Spins, Gear Lucky Spins, Gold, Cash, Runes, and Raid Tickets. Join the official Roblox group before redeeming codes.
animeFinalQuestCodes.intro: Use this module as the live codes area for Anime Final Quest. It highlights the newest working rewards first, keeps expired codes visible for fast checking, and shows the exact in-game redemption path players need.
animeFinalQuestCodes.groupNote: Anime Final Quest codes require the player to join the official Roblox group before claiming rewards in-game.

activeCodes.reward: 50 Weapon Lucky Spins and 30 Gear Lucky Spins
activeCodes.requirement: Join the Anime Final Quest Roblox group before redeeming.
redeemSteps: Join the official Anime Final Quest Roblox group.
Open Anime Final Quest on Roblox.
Click the Codes button on the right side of the screen.
Paste the code and press Confirm.

animeFinalQuestTierList.title: Anime Final Quest Tier List
animeFinalQuestTierList.subtitle: Compare the strongest Anime Final Quest weapons, gear, traits, accessories, and awakening picks for dungeon clears, boss damage, and team utility.
animeFinalQuestTierList.intro: This tier list groups the most useful loadout choices by combat role. Weapons carry your main damage, gear adds utility or burst, traits improve passive power, and accessories stack extra damage or survivability for harder raids.

entries.name: King Ripper
entries.role: Early weapon that falls behind later

entries.name: Heal
entries.role: Sustain for team or safer solo runs

entries.name: Agris Sword Awakening
entries.effect: Temporary power spike for finishing bosses

animeFinalQuestBeginnerGuide.title: Anime Final Quest Beginner Guide
animeFinalQuestBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the core Anime Final Quest loop: clear dungeons, beat bosses, collect drops, roll better weapons and gear, gather runes, finish quests, and push into harder modes.
animeFinalQuestBeginnerGuide.intro: Anime Final Quest is a wave-based dungeon RPG on Roblox. New players should focus on group access, basic controls, dungeon farming, weapon and gear rolls, rune-based build upgrades, and early quest rewards before chasing endgame loadouts.

steps.title: Join the Official Group and Claim Codes
steps.action: Join the Anime Final Quest Roblox group, then redeem working codes from the Codes button on the right side of the screen.
steps.whyItMatters: Codes provide early spins, Gold, Cash, Runes, and Raid Tickets so the first grind is easier.

steps.title: Learn the Core Controls
steps.action: Use M1 for basic attacks, 1-3 for skills, 4 for Gear, 5 for Ultimate Skill, Q for Dash, G for Awakening, Ctrl for Shiftlock, and mouse wheel for Lock Camera.
steps.whyItMatters: Dodging while attacking keeps you alive during waves and boss fights.

steps.title: Clear Anime Dungeons
steps.action: Fight through dungeon waves, defeat the boss at the end, and collect coins, loot, and drops.
steps.whyItMatters: Dungeon clears are the basic path to stronger gear, more resources, and harder content.

steps.title: Roll Weapons and Gear
steps.action: Use the Weapon and Gear options in the lobby to spend spins on stronger loadout pieces.
steps.whyItMatters: Weapons provide main damage, while Gear adds utility such as control, burst damage, or healing.

steps.title: Use Runes and Traits to Improve Your Build
steps.action: Save runes for valuable traits such as Skill Damage, M1 Damage, Crit Rate, or farming bonuses.
steps.whyItMatters: A good trait can make a strong weapon much better, while random rerolls can waste useful progress.

steps.title: Complete Early Quest Lines
steps.action: Prioritize useful quest rewards such as the Agris quest line, then keep completing quests for exclusive rewards and account growth.
steps.whyItMatters: Quest rewards help bridge the gap between beginner gear and stronger dungeon setups.

steps.title: Craft Cosmetics and Stack Account Upgrades
steps.action: Collect drops from dungeons and use crafting systems for cosmetics and accessories when available.
steps.whyItMatters: Crafted upgrades and accessories add survivability, crit, M1 damage, or skill damage for harder fights.

animeFinalQuestWeaponsAndGear.title: Anime Final Quest Weapons and Gear
animeFinalQuestWeaponsAndGear.subtitle: Compare the main Anime Final Quest weapons and gear pieces by role, damage style, utility, and progression value.
animeFinalQuestWeaponsAndGear.intro: Weapons are the main source of damage in Anime Final Quest, while gear changes how safely or quickly you clear waves and bosses. Use this table to plan whether a roll is worth keeping, upgrading, or replacing as you move from early dungeon farming into harder raids.

items.name: King of Curses
items.role: AOE damage, boss burst, and endgame farming
items.damageStyle: Fast M1 attacks, World Cutting Slashes, Cleave Dance, Fire Arrows, and Domain Expansion
items.progressionValue: Primary endgame target for Nightmare dungeon farming

items.name: Umbrella
items.role: Close-range AOE and safer mob clearing
items.damageStyle: Rapid attacks, Octa Shredder stun, Rain Piercer line damage, and Thunderbrella burst
items.utility: Invincibility frames help avoid dangerous boss or wave damage
items.progressionValue: Strong mid-to-late weapon for players who need both damage and safety

items.name: One-Eyed Reaper
items.damageStyle: Slower basic attacks with strong burst and an ultimate built for boss damage
items.progressionValue: Useful for boss-focused players before stronger SS options

items.name: Hawk Eye
items.damageStyle: Kitchen Slicer, Triple Knife, and Ground Slam ultimate
items.utility: Safe ranged pressure when timing is handled well
items.progressionValue: Serviceable early-to-mid weapon until better Legendary or Mythic rolls

items.name: King Ripper
items.damageStyle: Basic weapon damage with weak scaling
items.utility: No major HP or utility advantage
items.progressionValue: Replace quickly once stronger rolls become available

items.name: Time Stop
items.damageStyle: No direct damage focus; enables chained skills and ultimates
items.utility: Freezes enemies for setup, escape, or coordinated burst windows
items.progressionValue: Best for organized team runs and hard dungeon control

items.name: Coyote Pistol
items.damageStyle: Long-range beams that explode on impact and hit multiple enemies
items.utility: Low-cooldown pressure for kiting waves and bosses
items.progressionValue: Excellent solo gear when players want damage uptime instead of crowd control

items.name: Blood Hammer
items.utility: Can flatten groups, but cooldown limits repeated use
items.progressionValue: Good temporary AOE option before stronger gear rolls

items.name: Heal
items.role: Sustain for safer solo and team runs
items.utility: Restores HP for the player and nearby allies
items.progressionValue: Useful when survival matters more than clear speed

animeFinalQuestTraitsRunesBuilds.title: Anime Final Quest Traits, Runes, and Builds
animeFinalQuestTraitsRunesBuilds.subtitle: Plan your rerolls around damage, farming speed, and survivability instead of burning every resource the second it appears.
animeFinalQuestTraitsRunesBuilds.intro: Anime Final Quest builds are shaped by a weapon, a gear slot, traits, accessories, runes, and an awakening. The strongest setups start with a reliable weapon and gear choice, then use traits and accessories to multiply skill damage, M1 damage, or farming value.

items.title: Accuracy III
items.bestFor: Nightmare clearing, boss damage, and skill-focused weapons.
items.keepOrReroll: Keep once your weapon is strong enough to make skill damage matter.

items.title: Fortune
items.bestFor: Early and mid-game farming while building gold, levels, spins, and account resources.
items.keepOrReroll: Keep while farming, then swap later when raw damage becomes more valuable.

items.title: Power III
items.bestFor: Basic attack builds, especially with Strongest's Cape and weapons with strong M1 scaling.
items.keepOrReroll: Keep for M1-focused farming or when skill damage traits are unavailable.

items.title: Critical Chance
items.bestFor: Boss-focused builds that also use Agris Sword for its +20% Crit Chance.
items.keepOrReroll: Keep if your setup already uses Agris Sword, otherwise prioritize Accuracy or Power traits.

items.title: Rune Spending Rule
items.effect: Runes support trait and build enhancement
items.bestFor: Players who already have a stable weapon, gear slot, and dungeon farming route.
items.keepOrReroll: Spend runes after the core loadout is usable; chasing perfect traits too early slows progression.

items.title: Skill Damage Build
items.effect: King of Curses + Accuracy III + Divine Wheel + Agris Sword
items.bestFor: AOE dungeon clearing, boss phases, and high-difficulty runs.
items.keepOrReroll: Use Time Stop for team play or Coyote Pistol for solo damage.

items.title: M1 Damage Build
items.effect: Strongest's Cape + Power III + fast basic attacks
items.bestFor: Consistent clearing when skills are on cooldown.
items.keepOrReroll: Works well before you fully transition into Accuracy III skill-damage optimization.

items.title: Accessory Stack
items.effect: Agris Sword, Strongest's Cape, Divine Wheel, Royal Cape, and Scarf add value together
items.bestFor: Stacking damage multipliers, critical chance, and health bonuses across the account.
items.keepOrReroll: Craft and collect accessories instead of treating cosmetics as visual-only rewards.

animeFinalQuestDungeonsBossesRaids.title: Anime Final Quest Dungeons, Bosses, and Raids
animeFinalQuestDungeonsBossesRaids.subtitle: Use dungeons to earn drops, build better weapons and gear, and move into harder boss content with an actual plan.
animeFinalQuestDungeonsBossesRaids.intro: The core loop is simple: clear anime dungeons, defeat waves and bosses, collect drops, craft cosmetics, gather runes, and upgrade the build for harder content. Stronger weapons, useful gear, and better trait choices turn slow clears into repeatable farming routes.

items.title: Dungeon Core Loop
items.summary: Clear waves, beat the boss, collect loot, and use the rewards to improve weapons, gear, traits, and cosmetics.
details: Fight through anime dungeons with M1 attacks, skills, gear, an ultimate skill, dash movement, and awakening tools.
Obtain weapons and gear from progression systems, then use drops and runes to strengthen the build.
Repeat easier dungeons until the loadout is ready for Hard and Nightmare difficulty.

items.title: Difficulty Path
items.summary: Start on Normal, move into Hard after a stable weapon, and farm Nightmare when the build can clear safely.
details: Normal is for learning enemy patterns and collecting early materials.
Hard is the bridge for stronger quest requirements, including Golem Boss clears.
Nightmare gives better farming value once the player has enough damage, survivability, and mobility.

items.title: Boss Fight Pattern
items.summary: Treat bosses as movement checks, not just damage sponges.
details: Use a few M1 attacks, then dash sideways to avoid retaliation.
Save burst windows for Time Stop, Agris Awakening, or safe boss openings.
Prioritize staying alive over dumping every skill into a bad position.

items.title: Raid Ticket Use
items.summary: Raid Tickets appear as progression rewards and code rewards, so they should be treated as limited resources.
details: Build a stronger weapon and gear base before spending large ticket stacks.
Use tickets when the account can already clear harder content without wasting attempts.
Pair ticket spending with damage traits, useful gear, and accessories to get better value per run.

items.title: Team Clear Setup
items.summary: Team runs benefit from control, healing, and cooldown windows.
details: Time Stop is the main team-control gear choice for holding waves in place.
Heal supports longer boss fights and harder dungeons.
Coyote Pistol is stronger for solo players who need fast direct damage.

items.title: Fast Clear Checklist
items.summary: Faster clearing comes from fewer wasted movements, better targeting, and a build that matches the dungeon.
details: Group enemies before using AOE skills.
Remove ranged enemies early so they do not chip away health during pulls.
Farm one map until enemy patterns become predictable, then increase difficulty.

animeFinalQuestQuestsDropsCosmetics.title: Anime Final Quest Quests, Drops, and Cosmetics
animeFinalQuestQuestsDropsCosmetics.subtitle: Track the useful quest goals, dungeon drops, and cosmetic stats that turn repeated clears into visible account progress.
animeFinalQuestQuestsDropsCosmetics.intro: Anime Final Quest connects progression to quests, dungeon drops, craftable cosmetics, and awakening rewards. The Fiji and Agris reward path is especially useful because it pushes players through dungeons, boss clears, Nightmare clears, crafting, and co-op completion goals.

items.name: Agris Unlock Start
items.objective: Talk to Fiji's Quest NPC in the HUB near the Agris statue and choose the unlock dialogue.
items.reward: Opens the Agris questline and leads toward the Agris Ultimate Skill reward.
items.howToComplete: Reach Level 5+, then begin the questline from the HUB.

items.name: Complete 20 Dungeons
items.howToComplete: Use this as the main progress tracker while farming materials and learning enemy patterns.

items.name: Kill 500 Enemies
items.howToComplete: Farm repeatable dungeons with a weapon that clears groups quickly.

items.name: Kill Golem Boss in Hard Mode 3 Times
items.objective: Defeat the Golem Boss three times on Hard difficulty.
items.howToComplete: Bring a stable weapon, dodge boss attacks, and repeat Hard mode clears.

items.name: Complete 3 Nightmare Dungeons
items.objective: Clear three dungeons on Nightmare difficulty.
items.howToComplete: Attempt this after the build has stronger damage, a useful gear slot, and enough survivability.

items.name: Play Summon Gate with 1 More Person
items.objective: Complete Summon Gate, the first dungeon, with one additional player.
items.howToComplete: Queue with a teammate and finish the dungeon together.

items.name: Craft Strongest Cape
items.objective: Craft Strongest's Cape from dungeon materials.
items.howToComplete: Use 1x Golem's Heart, 4x Monkey Hair, and 5x Goblin Armor Piece at the Crafting Station.

items.name: Complete Summon Station 1 with a Legendary Weapon
items.objective: Clear Summon Station 1, the second dungeon, with a Legendary weapon on Hard Mode.
items.howToComplete: Spin or upgrade into a Legendary weapon first, then run the second dungeon on Hard.

items.name: Complete Summon Station 2 with an Epic Weapon
items.objective: Clear Summon Station 2, the third dungeon, with an Epic weapon on Normal Mode.
items.howToComplete: Equip an Epic weapon before starting the third dungeon on Normal.

items.name: Agris Sword Cosmetic
items.objective: Finish the Agris reward path to add the Agris Sword cosmetic to the build.
items.howToComplete: Use it as a stat-boosting cosmetic; it changes weapon appearance while the equipped weapon keeps its own base skills.

animeFinalQuestDiscordOfficialLinks.title: Anime Final Quest Discord and Official Links
animeFinalQuestDiscordOfficialLinks.subtitle: Use the official Roblox, Discord, Trello, and developer video sources to track updates, mechanics, codes, and community announcements.
animeFinalQuestDiscordOfficialLinks.intro: Anime Final Quest changes often, so the safest update path is to keep official links together. This hub points players to the live Roblox experience, the official Roblox community, the Discord server, the Trello information board, and the CELL GAMES YouTube channel.

items.label: Play Anime Final Quest
items.useCase: Launch the game, check the current update title, read the official game description, and view controls.
items.bestFor: Playing, update checks, and basic game information.

items.label: Anime Final Quest Roblox Community
items.useCase: Join the official game group connected to codes and community updates.
items.bestFor: Code requirements, group announcements, and official community identity.

items.label: Anime Final Quest Discord
items.useCase: Follow developer posts, code channels, update notes, bug reports, and player discussion.
items.bestFor: Fastest community updates and live announcements.

items.label: Anime Final Quest Information Trello
items.useCase: Check organized game information such as mechanics, items, weapons, gear, traits, and update references.

items.label: CELL GAMES YouTube
items.useCase: Watch official sneak peeks and developer video posts for Anime Final Quest.
items.bestFor: Visual update previews and developer-side media.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Anime Final Quest

questions.question: What are Anime Final Quest codes?
questions.answer: Anime Final Quest codes are free redeemable codes that grant Weapon Lucky Spins, Gear Lucky Spins, Gold, Cash, Runes, and Raid Tickets to help you roll stronger loadouts and progress faster.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Anime Final Quest?
questions.answer: Join the official Anime Final Quest Roblox group, open the game, click the Codes button on the right side of the screen, paste your code, and press Confirm to claim your rewards.

questions.question: Is Anime Final Quest free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Anime Final Quest is a free Roblox anime dungeon crawler. You can play it directly through the Roblox app on PC, mobile, and supported consoles without any purchase.

questions.question: How do I get better weapons in Anime Final Quest?
questions.answer: Spend Weapon Lucky Spins in the lobby, clear dungeons for drops and resources, save Runes for valuable traits, and redeem Anime Final Quest codes for extra spins to roll stronger weapons.

questions.question: Do I need to join the Anime Final Quest group to redeem codes?
questions.answer: Yes. Anime Final Quest codes require you to join the official Roblox group before you can claim rewards in-game, so join the group first before redeeming any code.

questions.question: What is the best way to start Anime Final Quest?
questions.answer: New Anime Final Quest players should join the group, redeem codes, learn the core controls, clear anime dungeons, roll weapons and gear, use Runes and Traits, and complete early quest lines for stable progression.
